Backflow Testing & Installation | Arlington Heights, IL

Do you need backflow testing and prevention services? Call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to request backflow testing and installation in Arlington Heights, IL.

A water distribution system is designed to allow clean water to flow from your supplier to your home’s appliances. However, hydraulic operations within the system can sometimes become defective, causing backflows. Backflows can mix up clean water with that from unprotected systems, making the water flowing in your home contaminated. If you notice a change in the quality of water flowing out of your plumbing fixtures, contact Plumbers 911 for help.

Whether you live in the neighborhood around Lake Arlington or the Golf Road community, our network of licensed plumbers is one phone call away to attend to your emergencies. Reach out to the customer service team at Plumbers 911 by dialing 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) to get backflow testing & installation in Arlington Heights.

Why You Might Need Backflow Testing & Installation

When polluted water flows through your home's plumbing system, it can create major issues, including corroded pipes, clogs and leaks. If that happens, you’ll need to spare some money for emergency plumbing repairs. However, the biggest problem could go beyond just damage to your plumbing system. The health of people living in your home will be at risk if they consume contaminated water. 

The main causes of backflow issues are back pressure and back-siphonage. Back pressure happens when non-potable water sources such as sprinkler systems and power washing tools have higher pressure than your clean water source. Back siphonage occurs when clean water supply pipes lose pressure and suck backward contaminated water from main water line breaks and when firefighters utilize large water volumes. When these issues arise, contact a qualified plumber right away. 

Backflow Testing & Installation Services in Arlington Heights

Backflow installation and testing are complex plumbing projects you can’t do on your own if you don't have experience in the field. A plumbing professional will come in handy when assessing the extent of the problem and installing the right size and type of backflow prevention device. Getting professional services rather than trying to do it yourself can help prevent reinstallation costs and buying the wrong backflow devices.

Plumbing professionals from Plumbers 911 will temporarily install the backflow test device on your water supply pipe. Afterward, they’ll open and close the gate and relief valves frequently to check for backflow signs such as gauge movements and water leaks. When backflow repair is necessary, licensed plumbers will carefully conduct backflow installation.

Hire a Arlington Heights Plumber Today

Plumbers 911 offers quality backflow testing and installation services, courtesy of our team of highly skilled plumbers. Our professional plumbers undergo over 10,000 hours of training and possess backflow test certification to give you peace of mind with your installation.

To prevent backflow issues in your home or to get trusted help with any other plumbing issue, call Plumbers 911 at 1-833-PLUM-911 (833-758-6911) for professional and friendly service.
